title: salix × lapczynskii
intro: Salix × lapczynskii is a hybrid of the willow family, a cross between Salix alba and Salix fragilis, known for its medicinal properties. The plant contains salicin, a compound similar to aspirin, which has anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. The health benefits of Salix × lapczynskii include reducing fever, relieving headaches and joint pain, and alleviating menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, salves, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
